'''Landing platform NL1922''' was one of the many landing platforms on the [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It served as the location of a small skirmish when [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] survivors [[Drake Lo'gaan/Legends|Drake Lo'gaan]] and [[Ekria/Legends|Ekria]] attacked an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] that had docked there.

==Appearances==
*''[[Evasive Action: End Game]]''
